{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR / Admin Officer",
  "description": "TNL Pharmaceuticals is a group of registered companies, with operational base throughout Nigeria and Corporate Head Offices in Lagos, Nigeria. Established in September 1997, TNLis a member of the Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Marketing Companies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
&nbsp;
Job Position: HR / Admin Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The HR/Admin Officer is responsible for supporting human resource functions and managing administrative activities to ensure smooth and efficient office operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in recruitment, onboarding, and staff documentation
	Maintain employee records and HR files
	Monitor staff attendance and leave records
	Ensure implementation of company policies and procedures
	Manage office supplies and administrative activities
	Coordinate office maintenance and support services
	Prepare HR and administrative reports when required.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related fields
	2 - 4 years of relevant experience in an HR/Admin role
	Good knowledge of HR policies and labor regulations
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, etc.)
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Ability to handle confidential information and multitask effectively.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;tnlrecruitment01@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

HR / Admin Officer Job at TNL Pharmaceuticals




        
    

        
        TNL Pharmaceuticals is a group of registered companies, with operational base throughout Nigeria and Corporate Head Offices in Lagos, Nigeria. Established in September 1997, TNLis a member of the Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Marketing Companies in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
 
Job Position: HR / Admin Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The HR/Admin Officer is responsible for supporting human resource functions and managing administrative activities to ensure smooth and efficient office operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in recruitment, onboarding, and staff documentation
	Maintain employee records and HR files
	Monitor staff attendance and leave records
	Ensure implementation of company policies and procedures
	Manage office supplies and administrative activities
	Coordinate office maintenance and support services
	Prepare HR and administrative reports when required.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related fields
	2 - 4 years of relevant experience in an HR/Admin role
	Good knowledge of HR policies and labor regulations
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, etc.)
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Ability to handle confidential information and multitask effectively.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quick Service Restaurant Manager",
  "description": "KloverHarris Limited is a leading business consulting and human resources company that specializes in providing comprehensive solutions in Learning and Development, HR Outsourcing, Business Consulting, and Information Technology. With a steadfast commitment to excellence and a customer-centric approach, we empower organizations to optimize their human resources, drive growth, and achieve sustainable success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quick Service Restaurant Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1 (Admiralty Way), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Restaurant Business Manager is fully accountable for the restaurant&rsquo;s commercial&nbsp;and operational performance.
	He or she will work the outlet team to drive profitability,&nbsp;operational excellence, brand standards, and an exceptional guest experience through&nbsp;strong leadership, disciplined execution, and sound business judgment.


Key Responsibilities:
Operations &amp; Quality Control:


	Oversee daily restaurant operations to ensure efficient and high-quality execution.
	Ensure adherence to recipes, portion controls, and food quality standards.
	Ensure product availability, effective display, and merchandising to support sales.


Financial &amp; Commercial Management:


	Deliver sales targets, customer growth, and profitability objectives.
	Control labour, food, and operating costs within approved budgets.
	Ensure accurate recording of all sales transactions, proper cash handling, and&nbsp;timely submission of daily sales reports.
	Review financial and sales reports regularly and implement initiatives to improve&nbsp;business growth.
	Support local marketing initiatives and in-store promotions.


People Management &amp; Leadership:


	Enforce grooming, dress code, and personal hygiene standards across all staff.
	Coach and develop team members to drive performance and accountability.
	Conduct performance reviews, identify training needs, and manage disciplinary&nbsp;actions as required in line with company guidelines.


Inventory &amp; Cost Control:


	Ensure strict adherence to inventory control procedures.
	Minimise waste, losses, and variances through effective stock management.


Customer Experience &amp; Brand Standards:


	Own customer experience, ensuring consistently high standards and customersatisfaction.
	Ensure cleanliness, food safety, and ambiance consistently meet brand and&nbsp;regulatory standards.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, Finance,&nbsp;Accounting, or related field.
	Proven experience managing restaurant, FMCG, or retail operations in a leadership&nbsp;role.
	Demonstrated ability to manage budgets, control costs, and deliver financial&nbsp;targets.
	Strong capability in inventory management, waste control, and stock accuracy.
	Proven experience leading, developing, and managing teams in a fast paced&nbsp;environment.
	Ability to implement SOPs and maintain operational, quality, and service&nbsp;standards.
	Strong understanding of food safety, hygiene, and regulatory compliance.
	Effective communication, decision-making, and problem solving skills.


Core Competencies:


	Commercial &amp; financial acumen
	Leadership and people development
	Operational excellence
	Customer experience management
	Inventory and cost control
	Problem solving and decision making
	Communication and stakeholder management


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates shouldsend their CV to:&nbsp;Recruitment@kloverharris.com&nbsp;using the Job&nbsp; subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Kloverharris Limited"
    
  },

Quick Service Restaurant Manager Job at KloverHarris Limited




        
    

        
        KloverHarris Limited is a leading business consulting and human resources company that specializes in providing comprehensive solutions in Learning and Development, HR Outsourcing, Business Consulting, and Information Technology. With a steadfast commitment to excellence and a customer-centric approach, we empower organizations to optimize their human resources, drive growth, and achieve sustainable success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quick Service Restaurant Manager

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1 (Admiralty Way), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Restaurant Business Manager is fully accountable for the restaurant’s commercial and operational performance.
	He or she will work the outlet team to drive profitability, operational excellence, brand standards, and an exceptional guest experience through strong leadership, disciplined execution, and sound business judgment.


Key Responsibilities:
Operations & Quality Control:


	Oversee daily restaurant operations to ensure efficient and high-quality execution.
	Ensure adherence to recipes, portion controls, and food quality standards.
	Ensure product availability, effective display, and merchandising to support sales.


Financial & Commercial Management:


	Deliver sales targets, customer growth, and profitability objectives.
	Control labour, food, and operating costs within approved budgets.
	Ensure accurate recording of all sales transactions, proper cash handling, and timely submission of daily sales reports.
	Review financial and sales reports regularly and implement initiatives to improve business growth.
	Support local marketing initiatives and in-store promotions.


People Management & Leadership:


	Enforce grooming, dress code, and personal hygiene standards across all staff.
	Coach and develop team members to drive performance and accountability.
	Conduct performance reviews, identify training needs, and manage disciplinary actions as required in line with company guidelines.


Inventory & Cost Control:


	Ensure strict adherence to inventory control procedures.
	Minimise waste, losses, and variances through effective stock management.


Customer Experience & Brand Standards:


	Own customer experience, ensuring consistently high standards and customersatisfaction.
	Ensure cleanliness, food safety, and ambiance consistently meet brand and regulatory standards.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, Finance, Accounting, or related field.
	Proven experience managing restaurant, FMCG, or retail operations in a leadership role.
	Demonstrated ability to manage budgets, control costs, and deliver financial targets.
	Strong capability in inventory management, waste control, and stock accuracy.
	Proven experience leading, developing, and managing teams in a fast paced environment.
	Ability to implement SOPs and maintain operational, quality, and service standards.
	Strong understanding of food safety, hygiene, and regulatory compliance.
	Effective communication, decision-making, and problem solving skills.


Core Competencies:


	Commercial & financial acumen
	Leadership and people development
	Operational excellence
	Customer experience management
	Inventory and cost control
	Problem solving and decision making
	Communication and stakeholder management


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates shouldsend their CV to: [email protected] using the Job  subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "First Excelsia Professional services - Our client, a Microfinance institution, is recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Microfinance

Job&nbsp;Summary


	Our client is seeking dynamic and results-driven marketer to join its team.
	The ideal candidate must possess good marketing and business development skills and should have good knowledge of lending and financial instruments.


Job Responsibilities


	Develop and execute marketing strategies to promote various loan products (personal, business, mortgage, etc.).
	Generate and nurture leads through digital campaigns, social media, in-person events, and partnerships.
	Create, manage, and optimize marketing funnels to guide prospects from interest to application.
	Maintain and update the company website and ensure SEO best practices are followed.
	Conduct market research to identify new opportunities and customer segments.
	Build relationships with referral partners, such as real estate agents, dealerships, or financial advisors.
	Coordinate with the compliance team to ensure all marketing materials meet regulatory standards.
	Prepare detailed monthly marketing reports and present findings to management.
	Monitor and analyze customer feedback to improve messaging and campaign performance.
	Stay up to date with industry trends, competitor strategies, and emerging marketing technologies.


Person Specification


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience.
	Ability to understand client needs &amp; financial objectives.
	Understanding of the financial sector.
	Experience in selling to all classes of client&rsquo;s traders, low-salary earners, and corporate organizations.
	Report writing and documentation skills.
	Excellent marketing and business development skills.
	Experience in the financial sector of microlending is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to:&nbsp;talentsearch@firstexcelsia.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Marketer&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Marketer Job at First Excelsia Professional services




        
    

        
        First Excelsia Professional services - Our client, a Microfinance institution, is recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Microfinance

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking dynamic and results-driven marketer to join its team.
	The ideal candidate must possess good marketing and business development skills and should have good knowledge of lending and financial instruments.


Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and execute marketing strategies to promote various loan products (personal, business, mortgage, etc.).
	Generate and nurture leads through digital campaigns, social media, in-person events, and partnerships.
	Create, manage, and optimize marketing funnels to guide prospects from interest to application.
	Maintain and update the company website and ensure SEO best practices are followed.
	Conduct market research to identify new opportunities and customer segments.
	Build relationships with referral partners, such as real estate agents, dealerships, or financial advisors.
	Coordinate with the compliance team to ensure all marketing materials meet regulatory standards.
	Prepare detailed monthly marketing reports and present findings to management.
	Monitor and analyze customer feedback to improve messaging and campaign performance.
	Stay up to date with industry trends, competitor strategies, and emerging marketing technologies.


Person Specification


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience.
	Ability to understand client needs & financial objectives.
	Understanding of the financial sector.
	Experience in selling to all classes of client’s traders, low-salary earners, and corporate organizations.
	Report writing and documentation skills.
	Excellent marketing and business development skills.
	Experience in the financial sector of microlending is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using “Marketer” as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Manager",
  "description": "ICS Outsourcing - Our client is seeking a candidate to lead and execute marketing initiatives that will increase brand visibility, drive customer acquisition, and support business growth.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Technology / Digital Services

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will have strong experience in digital marketing, brand management, campaign execution, and market strategy development.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Lead digital marketing campaigns across social media, email, search engines, and other digital channels.
	Manage and grow the company&rsquo;s brand presence and visibility across online and offline platforms.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify opportunities and trends.
	Collaborate with sales and product teams to design customer acquisition and retention strategies.
	Plan and manage marketing budgets, ensuring optimal return on investment.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance metrics and provide actionable insights.
	Manage relationships with external vendors, agencies, and media partners.
	Lead and mentor the marketing team to ensure effective execution of marketing initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field.
	3+ years of marketing experience.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools, analytics, and social media marketing.
	Proven track record in brand development and campaign management.
	Excellent communication, leadership, and strategic thinking skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced and target-driven environment.


Salary
N220,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cudeh@icsoutsourcing.com&nbsp;using &quot;Marketing Manager - Application&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Marketing Manager Job at ICS Outsourcing




        
    

        
        ICS Outsourcing - Our client is seeking a candidate to lead and execute marketing initiatives that will increase brand visibility, drive customer acquisition, and support business growth.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager
Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Technology / Digital Services

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will have strong experience in digital marketing, brand management, campaign execution, and market strategy development.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies aligned with business objectives.
	Lead digital marketing campaigns across social media, email, search engines, and other digital channels.
	Manage and grow the company’s brand presence and visibility across online and offline platforms.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify opportunities and trends.
	Collaborate with sales and product teams to design customer acquisition and retention strategies.
	Plan and manage marketing budgets, ensuring optimal return on investment.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance metrics and provide actionable insights.
	Manage relationships with external vendors, agencies, and media partners.
	Lead and mentor the marketing team to ensure effective execution of marketing initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field.
	3+ years of marketing experience.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools, analytics, and social media marketing.
	Proven track record in brand development and campaign management.
	Excellent communication, leadership, and strategic thinking skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced and target-driven environment.


Salary
N220,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Marketing Manager - Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "General Manager",
  "description": "Gbenga Badejo and Co. - Our client is a leading luxury stationery company with over 25 years of excellence in crafting premium social and office stationery to international standards.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities


	Overseeing daily business operations.
	Developing and implementing growth strategies.
	Oversee daily operations of the business organization.
	Coordinate the development of Key Performance goals for functions and direct reports.
	Provide direct management of key functional managers and executives in the business unit.
	Ensure the development of tactical programs to pursue targeted goals and objectives.
	Evaluating performance and productivity.
	Analysing accounting and financial data.


Education and Experience


	A proven background in Advertising and Marketing Communication is required for this role.
	5-10 years in a General Manager Role.
	A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration or related courses from a reputable educational institution.
	A master&rsquo;s degree will be an advantage
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills
	Good knowledge of different business functions.
	Strong leadership qualities and Excellent communications skills.
	Highly organized and Proactive.
	Good interpersonal skills and strong work ethic.
	Meticulous attention to detail
	Applicants residing in Ikeja and environs are preferred.


Compensation
This is a full-time role with competitive salary.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-10",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-18",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

General Manager Job at Gbenga Badejo & Co.




        
    

        
        Gbenga Badejo and Co. - Our client is a leading luxury stationery company with over 25 years of excellence in crafting premium social and office stationery to international standards.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Overseeing daily business operations.
	Developing and implementing growth strategies.
	Oversee daily operations of the business organization.
	Coordinate the development of Key Performance goals for functions and direct reports.
	Provide direct management of key functional managers and executives in the business unit.
	Ensure the development of tactical programs to pursue targeted goals and objectives.
	Evaluating performance and productivity.
	Analysing accounting and financial data.


Education and Experience


	A proven background in Advertising and Marketing Communication is required for this role.
	5-10 years in a General Manager Role.
	A Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration or related courses from a reputable educational institution.
	A master’s degree will be an advantage
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills
	Good knowledge of different business functions.
	Strong leadership qualities and Excellent communications skills.
	Highly organized and Proactive.
	Good interpersonal skills and strong work ethic.
	Meticulous attention to detail
	Applicants residing in Ikeja and environs are preferred.


Compensation
This is a full-time role with competitive salary.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
